channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-8643] sanity test_123a: test failed to respond and timed out
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Niu Yawei <yawei.niu@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/e5c0755c-8420-11e6-a35f-5254006e85c2.

The sub-test test_123a failed with the following error:

test failed to respond and timed out

Please provide additional information about the failure here.

Info required for matching: sanity 123a
item.summary: sanity test_123a: test failed to respond and timed out

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
client console: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_logs/ebae31a2-8420-11e6-a35f-5254006e85c2/show_text

05:54:14:[ 5898.103804] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity test 123a: verify statahead work =========================================================== 05:54:10 (1474894450)
